title: FANMOESUN: The Forced Convection Variation for MOESUN
author: Siti Nur Amalina Mohd Halidi
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The ever-increasing global population has affected food security in various ways. Dehydrating crops serve as one of the methods to preserve food and improve their shelf life. Open drying method, which is the most traditional and economical method of preserving food, is susceptible to various pests and weather conditions. The research team formulated and designed a product to solve this issue, which is the MOESUN, a mobile solar dryer suitable to be used by hobbyists and homeowners. Not only that, but the team also proposed variants to the MOESUN, which are the FOLMOESUN and FANMOESUN. In this paper, FANMOESUN will be discussed. FANMOESUN is the solution for MOESUN should the mobile solar dryer is used during rainy season. FANMOESUN is the forced convection variant of the original MOESUN, where an additional fan is placed to induce forced convection to the mobile solar dryer. This variant proves to be efficient during rainy season as food drying can still be done. By commercializing this product, customers have the option to use the basic MOESUN or use the fan added FANMOESUN. FANMOESUN has the same potential to commercialize based on the data obtained, like its predecessor, MOESUN and FOLMOESUN. Costing details will be one of the steps needed to be taken to commercialize this product later.
